name: Via Renewables Inc. 8.75% Series A Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock
summary: Via Renewables Inc. 8.75% Series A Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock are preferred shares issued by Via Renewables Inc., a retail energy provider. These shares offer a fixed dividend rate which may convert to a floating rate at a later date, providing a potential income stream for investors. Via Renewables Inc. is headquartered in Houston, Texas.
